title: WAF LDAP Injection Attack Blocked
description: Detects LDAP injection attempts blocked by WAF. Attackers manipulate LDAP queries to bypass authentication or extract directory information. OWASP A03:2021 Injection.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI WAF Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs') and (('Action' = 'BLOCK') and (('Request URL' like '*)(cn=*' or 'Request URL' like '*)(uid=*' or 'Request URL' like '*)(mail=*' or 'Request URL' like '*)(|(cn=*' or 'Request URL' like '**)(&*' or 'Request URL' like '**)(objectClass=*' or 'Request URL' like '*)(userPassword=*' or 'Request URL' like '**))(|*' or 'Request URL' like '*admin)(&)*' or 'Request URL' like '*x])(objectClass*')))
falsepositives: LDAP-based search functionality with special characters
